workflow.name: Epic and Story Creation
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}

ECC-ORCHESTRATED EPIC AND STORY CREATION Sequence: prerequisites -> epic design (planner) -> per-epic story generation (planner + architect + security) -> cross-epic analysis -> validation -> finalization This workflow produces: epics.md + individual story files with File Specs, Architectural ACs, Tasks/Subtasks, and Dev Notes

HARDENING ANALYSIS: Every story is checked against 6 hardening patterns to proactively detect technical debt that would otherwise emerge during code review. Findings are classified as BUILT-IN (added to existing story) or SEPARATE (new hardening story). Target: reduce 2.3x story multiplier to under 1.3x.
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip all generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at Steps 1, 2, 3c, and 5 user gates. All other steps auto-proceed.

step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-knowledge.md

step.goal: Validate planning artifacts and extract requirements
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-prerequisites.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-epic-design.md

step.goal: Generate stories for each epic with hardening analysis
step.critical: Process epics SEQUENTIALLY. Within each epic, use parallel agents where possible.
Each epic goes through: story breakdown -> hardening analysis -> consolidation -> file generation

loop.action: Set {{current_epic_frs}} = FRs assigned to this epic
Set {{current_epic_nfrs}} = NFRs relevant to this epic
Set {{current_epic_ars}} = ARs relevant to this epic
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03a-story-breakdown.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03b-hardening-analysis.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03c-consolidation.md

check.action: Append story summaries to {{epics_file}} without generating individual files
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03d-story-files.md

loop.action: Append Epic {{current_epic.number}} section with all stories to {{epics_file}}

step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-cross-epic.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-validation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-finalization.md
